data.title: Binance Launches Capital Connect Masters Tournament with $300,000 Prize Pool
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is introducing the Capital Connect Masters Tournament, an exclusive competition tailored for professional trading teams and crypto asset managers. Participants will compete across three strategic categories: Basis/Funding Arb, CTA/Momentum/Directional, and Statistical Arb/Multi-factor. The tournament offers a prize pool valued at up to $300,000 and provides exposure to institutional capital through the Capital Connect platform, contingent upon meeting eligibility criteria.

Capital Connect serves as a bridge between trading teams aiming to raise and invest capital professionally and institutional investors seeking structured access to crypto strategies. Built on Binance’s robust infrastructure, Capital Connect utilizes Portfolio Accounts as an institutional-grade layer, allowing trading teams to consolidate investor capital securely within Binance. This framework is adapted from traditional finance, ensuring seamless and secure institutional capital flow.

The campaign period includes a registration phase from 2026-04-09 12:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-15 23:59 (UTC), followed by a trading period from 2026-04-17 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-05-16 23:59 (UTC). Eligibility is open to all verified trading teams and crypto asset managers operating in regions where Capital Connect is accessible, with a minimum of $100,000 Assets Under Management (AUM) deposited before the competition start date. Participants must complete the enrollment form to register their team and select from one of the three categories. Existing Portfolio Account holders can use their current accounts directly for the competition.

The reward structure includes a performance rank calculated for each participating team based on a standardized composite score derived from absolute return, volatility, and maximum drawdown. The top three teams in each category will receive rewards, including trading fee rebate vouchers and exclusive experiences. Winners will be recognized on their Capital Connect portfolio profile from 2026-06-01 to 2026-09-30, subject to eligibility and opting-in. Trading Fee Rebate vouchers will be credited to eligible winners’ selected Portfolio Accounts by 2026-06-22 and can be extended if requested by the winners. Participants must adhere strictly to market conduct and surveillance rules, with Binance reserving the right to disqualify any team violating competition rules or engaging in manipulative trading.

data.title: Tokenized Perpetual Swaps Reach $30.7 Billion in Weekly Volume
data.description: Tokenized perpetual swaps linked to traditional assets have seen significant growth, reaching a weekly volume of $30.7 billion by the end of March, according to NS3.AI. This figure represents 1.72% of the total crypto derivatives market. The surge was primarily driven by commodities, with total weekly volume across these contracts peaking at $54.5 billion during the metals rally in February.

data.title: First U.S. Spot PEPE ETF Filed by Canary Capital
data.description: Canary Capital has submitted a registration to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for what could become the first U.S. spot PEPE ETF. According to NS3.AI, if the application is approved, this product would provide regulated exposure to PEPE, noted as the fourth-largest memecoin by market capitalization.

data.title: Brag House Holdings Shareholders Approve Merger with House of Doge
data.description: Brag House Holdings, a Nasdaq-listed company, has announced that its shareholders have overwhelmingly approved a merger proposal with the official Dogecoin Foundation entity, House of Doge, with over 98% voting in favor. According to Foresight News, the merger aims to create a public platform that connects sports, digital finance, and blockchain infrastructure. The initiative will also integrate Brag House's resources in the collegiate sports and media sectors.

data.title: Independent Miner Achieves Rare Bitcoin Block Discovery
data.description:
An independent Bitcoin miner achieved a rare feat by successfully mining a Bitcoin block with a very low probability. According to BlockBeats, the miner used CKpool's solo mining software to mine block number 944,306, earning a total of 3.128 Bitcoin.

Data from block explorer Mempool indicates that the miner received a block subsidy of 3.125 Bitcoin and transaction fees amounting to 0.003 Bitcoin.

CKpool developer Con Kolivas noted on the X platform that the miner accomplished this with just 70TH of computing power. The probability of a miner of this scale discovering a block daily is approximately one in 100,000, with an average occurrence of once every 300 years.

data.title: Whale Opens High-Leverage Short Positions in Bitcoin and Ethereum
data.description: A whale has recently initiated 20x leverage short positions in Bitcoin and Ethereum. According to Odaily, the positions include 562.58 BTC and 18,350 ETH, with a total estimated value of $80 million.

data.title: European Financial Institutions Predict Short-Term Stability in Oil Prices Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description:
Several European financial institutions released reports on the 8th, forecasting that international oil prices are unlikely to return to pre-conflict levels between the U.S., Israel, and Iran in the short term. According to Odaily, the market should focus on the passage through the Strait of Hormuz and the restoration of infrastructure in the Middle East region. ING Group noted that the news of a two-week ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran has somewhat alleviated concerns about long-term disruptions in oil supply, causing international oil prices to fall below $100 per barrel. The future trajectory of oil prices will depend on whether a lasting agreement can be reached in negotiations and if shipping levels through the strait can return to normal. It is expected that the market will continue to experience volatility during the negotiation period.

UBS Group stated that it remains unclear when and to what extent shipping through the strait will resume, as some tankers will need time to re-route. If passage through the strait is blocked again, energy prices could quickly rebound. Additionally, even under optimistic scenarios, the repair of energy infrastructure and the resumption of production could take weeks or even months. Therefore, energy prices are unlikely to fall back to pre-conflict levels in the short term.

data.title: Bitcoin Bancorp Expands Bitcoin ATM Network in Southern California
data.description:
Bitcoin Bancorp has announced the launch of a licensed Bitcoin ATM network in Southern California, with the first machines now operational in the Los Angeles area. According to Odaily, this marks a new phase in the company's retail expansion in the United States, following its previous deployment in Texas, highlighting its strategy to accelerate growth in key markets.

Data indicates that the United States currently hosts over 35,000 Bitcoin ATMs, with the industry expected to grow from approximately $267 million in 2025 to $7.68 billion by 2034. California, with its large population, advanced tech ecosystem, and high rate of cryptocurrency adoption, is a significant growth market, ranking among the top states in the nation for ATM installations, second only to states like Texas.

data.title: AINFT Transitions to B.AI Brand Focused on Agent Finance
data.description: The official Twitter account of AINFT will transition to B.AI starting today. According to ChainCatcher, the B.AI brand aims to advance Agent Finance, which involves AI Agents autonomously managing funds, executing trades, and optimizing returns, thereby granting artificial intelligence true financial autonomy and accelerating the realization of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). To ensure a smooth transition for the community, the brand will implement phased upgrades to avoid the impact of a one-time switch. During this process, AINFT will continue to operate as a core sub-brand within the B.AI ecosystem. All content, technological iterations, and community activities related to AINFT will be migrated to the new platform @AINFTcom.

data.title: Iran Utilizes Cryptocurrency for Strait of Hormuz Passage Fees
data.description: Iran is employing cryptocurrency to collect fees from ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, TRM highlighted that the rapid nature of digital currency transactions and their operation outside the U.S. banking system complicate efforts by the U.S. to freeze or block these payments in real time.

data.title: BlackRock transferred 19,935 ETH to a Coinbase Prime address.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, about an hour ago, BlackRock transferred a total of 19,935 ETH, worth $43.65 million, to a Coinbase Prime address through its Ethereum exchange-traded fund ETHA. Further transactions are expected to follow.

data.title: Gate.com's total ETH staked amount surpassed 176,500, setting a new all-time high, with an annualized yield of 4.11%.
data.description: According to the latest data from the Gate platform, the total staking volume of its ETH mining (staking) product has reached a new all-time high of 176,500 ETH, with a reference annualized yield of 4.11%. Users can obtain an equivalent amount of GTETH by staking ETH, realizing asset appreciation. This service supports instant redemption, releasing liquidity and obtaining stable returns. In addition to ETH, the platform also offers multi-currency staking options. As of press time, the reference annualized yields are: GUSD 3.00%, BTC 2.57%, SOL 8.50%, and USDT 4.24%.

data.title: Bloomberg: Hong Kong Mortgage Corporation plans to issue the world's largest digital bond, raising up to HK$12 billion.
data.description: Hong Kong Mortgage Corporation Limited (HKMCC) plans to raise up to HK$12 billion (US$1.5 billion) through its first-ever digital bond issuance, potentially becoming the world's largest such bond issuance ever. HKMCC is a government-owned financial services provider with total assets of approximately HK$221.8 billion. Sources familiar with the matter revealed that HKMCC expects to begin launching multi-currency digital bonds denominated in Hong Kong dollars and offshore yuan as early as next month. Utilizing blockchain technology in the issuance, trading, and settlement of these debt instruments will not only shorten settlement times and reduce costs but also accelerate scalability. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Exodus Movement disclosed that its BTC holdings increased to 628 and SOL holdings increased to 17,541 at the end of March.
data.description: Exodus Movement, a US-listed self-custodied cryptocurrency company, released updated data on its digital asset holdings as of the end of March. The company's Bitcoin holdings increased to 628 (a net increase of 18 BTC in the month), Ethereum holdings increased to 1,857 (a net increase of 17 ETH in the month), and Solana holdings increased to 17,541 (a net increase of 1,847 in the month). (Globenewswire)

data.title: AI TRENDS | Xverse Launches AI-Driven Bitcoin Wallet for Enhanced Transactions
data.description: Bitcoin wallet Xverse has announced the introduction of its AI-powered Agentic Wallet, designed to facilitate payments, transactions, and fund management on the Bitcoin network. According to Foresight News, the wallet utilizes Spark for lightning payments and supports machine-payable APIs through MPP, featuring a fully self-custodial architecture.

data.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker Warns of Consequences for Ceasefire Violations
data.description: On April 9, Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf stated that any breach of the ceasefire agreement will result in clear consequences. According to BlockBeats, Ghalibaf emphasized the importance of adhering to the terms of the agreement to avoid potential repercussions. The statement underscores the significance of maintaining peace and stability in the region.

data.title: ARIA Experiences Significant Price Drop of Over 80%
data.description: ARIA's price has experienced a substantial decline, falling by 82.85% to trade at $0.1031. According to NS3.AI, this significant drop highlights the volatility and challenges currently facing the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: ARIA has fallen 83% in the past hour and is currently trading at 0.1238 USDT.
data.description: Market data shows that ARIA has fallen 83% in the past hour and is currently trading at 0.1238 USDT.

data.title: Hormuz Shipping Crisis Presents Opportunity for Canada to Mend Ties with Trump
data.description:
The ongoing shipping crisis in the Strait of Hormuz has opened a diplomatic window for Canada to improve relations with U.S. President Donald Trump. Bloomberg posted on X that the situation has escalated tensions in the region, affecting global oil supply routes. Canada, with its strategic position and resources, is in a unique position to offer assistance and mediate in the crisis.

The Strait of Hormuz is a critical chokepoint for the global oil trade, and recent disruptions have raised concerns over energy security. As a major oil producer, Canada could play a pivotal role in stabilizing the situation by increasing its oil exports to offset potential shortages.

Furthermore, this crisis presents an opportunity for Canada to strengthen its diplomatic ties with the United States. By offering support and collaboration, Canada can demonstrate its commitment to regional stability and international cooperation.

The Canadian government is reportedly considering various options to address the situation, including diplomatic engagement and increased energy exports. This approach could not only help alleviate the immediate crisis but also pave the way for improved bilateral relations with the U.S. under President Trump's administration.

As the situation develops, Canada’s actions could have significant implications for both regional stability and its relationship with the United States.

data.title: B.AI officially launched, the underlying economic engine driving AGI evolution.
data.description: According to official news, BaiB.AI, the underlying economic engine dedicated to driving the evolution of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), has been officially launched. As an infrastructure-level project for the AI ​​Agent era, BaiB.AI will build a standardized on-chain identity system and frictionless payment protocol, granting machines independent economic sovereignty, enabling them to autonomously complete value exchange and collaborative cooperation, thereby breaking through the constraints of the physical world and financial gateways. BaiB.AI not only aims to create economic loops between intelligent agents and between humans and intelligent agents, but also to accelerate the birth of AGI, truly realizing the borderless flow of intelligence and the sharing of value among all. The official launch of BaiB.AI marks a crucial leap from "tool intelligence" to "economic intelligence," laying the foundation for building an open, fair, and inclusive intelligent society.
